heroTitle: Create, approve, track, and deliver business documents from one clean workspace
heroSubtitle: docrud helps teams generate polished documents, route approvals, manage files, collect signatures, and monitor every step without workflow clutter.
socialProofLabel: Built for operations, HR, legal, finance, and client-facing teams
gettingStartedSubtitle: Launch fast with templates, controls, and a workflow that scales only when your team is ready.

gettingStartedSteps.title: Create your workspace
gettingStartedSteps.description: Set up your company profile, admin access, and plan based on your expected document load.

gettingStartedSteps.title: Set templates and controls
gettingStartedSteps.description: Upload signatures, define approvals, and prepare the templates your team uses most.

gettingStartedSteps.title: Run live workflows
gettingStartedSteps.description: Generate, review, share, and track documents once the process is proven inside your team.

audienceSectionSubtitle: docrud fits teams that need faster document turnaround, stronger controls, and a more professional delivery experience.
softwareModulesTitle: One workspace for the full document lifecycle
softwareModulesSubtitle: Generation, review, approvals, sharing, analytics, and AI guidance stay connected so teams move faster with less follow-up.
pricingSectionSubtitle: Start with the essentials, unlock advanced controls as usage grows, and keep pricing tied to real document volume.
pricingPageTitle: Choose the plan that matches your team and document load
pricingPageSubtitle: Each plan is designed for disciplined rollout, predictable usage, and clean scaling.
contactHeading: Talk to our team about your rollout
contactSubtitle: Share your document flow, approval complexity, client requirements, and branding needs. We will map the right setup for your team.
contactPageSubtitle: Tell us where your document process slows down today. We will help you scope the right setup, controls, and plan.
demoPageSubtitle: See the platform with your workflows, team structure, and approval path in mind so the demo feels directly relevant.
demoBenefits: See generation, approvals, file governance, and sharing in one flow
Review the modules that matter most to your team
Discuss rollout, branding, migration, and usage planning live
screenshotsSectionSubtitle: Show buyers the product before they book a call. Highlight the views that matter most to your workflow rollout.
featureHighlights: Generate documents with structured fields, reusable templates, and governed editing
Route approvals, signatures, and file requests with full audit visibility
Use DoXpert AI to score documents, flag risks, and improve responses

featureCards.title: Configurable by design
featureCards.description: Adjust branding, roles, approvals, templates, and integrations without rebuilding your stack.

audienceProfiles.usage: Run daily document generation, approvals, file collection, and tracked delivery from one workspace.
audienceProfiles.benefit: Reduce delays, remove follow-up chaos, and keep every document step visible.

audienceProfiles.usage: Handle offer letters, onboarding packs, employee forms, and signature workflows with less manual effort.
audienceProfiles.benefit: Deliver a smoother employee experience while reducing repetitive coordination.

audienceProfiles.usage: Manage contracts, notices, reviews, and controlled approval cycles from one governed system.
audienceProfiles.benefit: Protect turnaround time while keeping access, evidence, and accountability intact.

audienceProfiles.usage: Handle vendor paperwork, approvals, compliance packs, and renewals with stronger process visibility.
audienceProfiles.benefit: Improve audit readiness and reduce delays caused by fragmented files and email trails.

pricingPlans.name: Free Starter
pricingPlans.description: A tightly limited trial for teams validating workflow fit before they subscribe.

pricingPlans.name: Team
pricingPlans.description: For small teams that need professional document workflows without heavy overhead.

pricingPlans.name: Business
pricingPlans.description: For growing teams that need approvals, analytics, client sharing, and stronger governance.

pricingPlans.name: Scale
pricingPlans.description: For high-volume teams that need tighter controls, broader AI usage, and stronger admin support.

pricingPlans.name: Enterprise
pricingPlans.description: For large organizations with custom security, governance, and commercial requirements.
